narrative:
Cincinnati 14-I (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,406 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 6.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 36.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 29.5 percentage points.
